— 04 · The Model

The best
open-source
separation model.
Built in.

BS-RoFormer SW is the highest-scoring music source separation model available today. Compiled to Apple CoreML and shipped natively inside SPLIT — no cloud, no GPU rental, no dependencies.

Scores that were impossible two years ago.
Now running natively on your Mac.

↳ SDR measured on MUSDB18 benchmark. Higher = cleaner separation. Source: ISMIR 2025 evaluation.

— 05 · Four Modes

Pick your decomposition.

Four separation depths. Same engine. Choose what fits the track — from a fast vocal pull to a full ensemble decomposition.

2-Stem
~15 sec
Vocals + Instrumental. For remixes, karaoke, sampling.
4-Stem
~20 sec
Vocals · Drums · Bass · Other. The industry standard split.
6-Stem
~30 sec
Most Popular
Vocals · Drums · Bass · Guitar · Piano · Other. Full decomposition. Nothing hidden.
6-Stem Pro
~60 sec
Ensemble
Ensemble mode: BS-RoFormer + MelBand Roformer. When every decibel of clarity matters.
— 06 · Workflow

Three steps. Zero friction.

01
Drop
Drag any audio file. WAV, MP3, FLAC, M4A, AIFF, OGG. Or click Browse. That's the hardest part.
02
Split
BS-RoFormer processes your track locally. Watch the progress bar. Preview each stem in real time. Solo the vocals. Mute the drums. Adjust the faders.
03
Create
Export all 6 stems as WAV or FLAC. Or hit Send to Mixcraft and let AI analyze, generate mixing recipes, and push them to BALANZE. From stems to finished master. One ecosystem.

— 08 · The Ecosystem

From stems
to finished master.

Your Mix A finished stereo track. WAV, MP3, FLAC — anything you've got.
SPLIT Separates the track into 6 pristine stems. Locally. No upload.
Mixcraft AI classifies tracks, detects masking, generates mixing recipes.
Balanze Canal Applies per-channel processing: EQ, Compression, Color.
Balanze Master Coordinates the bus, images the stereo field, maximizes the loudness.
Finished Master Mixed. Mastered. Ready for release. One ecosystem, end-to-end.
No other stem separator does this. SPLIT isn't just a tool —
it's the entry point to the first mixing ecosystem that thinks, executes, and teaches.

— 10 · Specs

The fine print
that isn't fine print.

Formats
VST3 · AU · Standalone (macOS)
AI Models
BS-RoFormer SW (6-stem)
MelBand Roformer (vocals ensemble)
HTDemucs FT (4-stem)
Acceleration
Apple CoreML (M1 / M2 / M3 / M4)
NVIDIA CUDA · CPU fallback
Input formats
WAV · MP3 · FLAC · M4A · AIFF · OGG
Output
WAV 16 / 24 / 32-bit float · FLAC
Sample rates
44.1 / 48 / 96 kHz output
(internal processing at 44.1 kHz)
Plugin size
~350 MB · AI model included
no internet download needed
System
macOS 12+ · 8 GB RAM min (16 GB rec.)
2 GB disk free
Processing time
~30 sec per track on Apple Silicon
~2 min on Intel CPU
Updates
Free for life · signed with Pad Works ID
